title: DuckDuckGo installs jumped 18% after Google killed the blue links. On Apple devices, the spike hit 70%. - The Next Web
summary_full: DuckDuckGo installs jumped 18% after Google killed the blue links. On Apple devices, the spike hit 70%.  The Next WebDuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search  TechCrunchGoogle's AI-First Overhaul Annoys Users So Much They Are Actually Switching Search Engines  inc.comIt's time we give up on Google Search and start using these alternatives  MakeUseOfDuckDuckGo's 'No AI' Search Traffic Climbs as Users Reject Google's AI Overhaul  MacRumors
